Question:
We want to do a logistic regression analysis using the exam survey weights to study the association between UACR-SACR ratio and diabetic retinopathy. 
UACR-SACR ratio  will be calculated as urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio UACR (mg/g)/ (serum albumin ALB (g/dL)/serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL))) and then categorized in quartiles(%) Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75. Diabetic retinopathy presence will be based on their response from diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy, categorized as 1 and 0.
We will use NHANES data from 2009-2016, and will exclude participants whose age in years at screening were less than 20 years old, who had missing response when asked doctor told you have diabetes or didn't say yes when asked doctor told you have diabetes, missing status on diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy, missing serum albumin (ALB)(g/dL), serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL), urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio((UACR (mg/g)) 
for analysis, include the following covariates: age in years at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin categorized as Mexican American, Other Hispanic, Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Other, education level categorized as primary school, secondary school, college or above, not recorded, and poverty income ratio (PIR), categorized as Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, and Q_unknown (for missing values).
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted logistic regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2009-2016

Inclusion Criteria:
- None

Exclusion Criteria:
- age in years at screening < 20
- missing response to "doctor told you have diabetes"
- did not respond "Yes" to "doctor told you have diabetes"
- missing status on "diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy"
- missing serum albumin ALB (g/dL)
- missing serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL)
- missing urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio UACR (mg/g)

Covariates:
- age in years at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  - Mexican American
  - Other Hispanic
  - Non-Hispanic White
  - Non-Hispanic Black
  - Other
- education level categorized as:
  - primary school
  - secondary school
  - college or above
  - not recorded
- poverty income ratio (PIR) categorized as:
  - Q1
  - Q2
  - Q3
  - Q4
  - Q_unknown (for missing values)

Predictor:
- UACR-SACR ratio calculated as:
  UACR-SACR ratio = urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio UACR (mg/g) / (serum albumin ALB (g/dL) / serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL))
  then categorized in quartiles (%) as:
    Q1: <=25
    Q2: >25 and <=50
    Q3: >50 and <=75
    Q4: >75

Outcome:
- diabetic retinopathy presence, based on response to "diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy", categorized as:
  - 1 = retinopathy present
  - 0 = retinopathy absent

SQL:
-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_h
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_i
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age in years at screening", "age in years at screening"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "doctor told you have diabetes", "doctor told you have diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g
UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"

UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy", "diabetes affected eyes/had retinopathy"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"

UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" AS "diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy"
FROM nhanes.diq_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy ON temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "serum albumin alb (g/dL)", "serum albumin alb (g/dL)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_albumin_g_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_albumin_g_dl AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_g_dl" AS "albumin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_g_dl" AS "albumin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_g_dl" AS "albumin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_g_dl" AS "albumin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_albumin_g_dl ON temp_master_albumin_g_dl (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "serum creatinine scr (mg/dL)", "serum creatinine scr (mg/dL)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "creatinine_mg_dl" AS "creatinine_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "creatinine_mg_dl" AS "creatinine_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "creatinine_mg_dl" AS "creatinine_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "creatinine_mg_dl" AS "creatinine_mg_dl"
FROM nhanes.biopro_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl ON temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio uacr (mg/g)", "urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio uacr (mg/g)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g" AS "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g"
FROM nhanes.alb_cr_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g" AS "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g"
FROM nhanes.alb_cr_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g" AS "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g"
FROM nhanes.alb_cr_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g" AS "albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g"
FROM nhanes.alb_cr_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g ON temp_master_albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin", "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "education level", "education level"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_education_level_adults_20;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_education_level_adults_20 AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "education_level_adults_20" AS "education_level_adults_20"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "education_level_adults_20" AS "education_level_adults_20"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "education_level_adults_20" AS "education_level_adults_20"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "education_level_adults_20" AS "education_level_adults_20"
FROM nhanes.demo_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_education_level_adults_20 ON temp_master_education_level_adults_20 (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "poverty income ratio (pir)", "poverty income ratio (pir)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" AS "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty"
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" AS "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" AS "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty"
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" AS "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty"
FROM nhanes.demo_i;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty ON temp_master_ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_albumin_g_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_education_level_adults_20
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy",
    t3."albumin_g_dl",
    t4."creatinine_mg_dl",
    t5."albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g",
    t6."gender",
    t7."race_hispanic_origin",
    t8."education_level_adults_20",
    t9."ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_albumin_g_dl t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_education_level_adults_20 t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1: Include all participants from final_master_table
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT DISTINCT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Serial Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants younger than 20 years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20
   OR f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing response to "doctor told you have diabetes"
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants who did NOT answer "Yes" to "doctor told you have diabetes"
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing diabetes retinopathy status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants with missing serum albumin (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude participants with missing serum creatinine (mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude participants with missing urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio (UACR, mg/g)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Final Cohort ==========

-- Define the final analysis cohort after all exclusions
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age in years at screening
-- Extract age at screening for cohort participants
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender for cohort participants
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin (derived categories)
-- Map detailed race/hispanic origin to specified categories
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
         WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Mexican American' THEN 'Mexican American'
         WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Hispanic' THEN 'Other Hispanic'
         WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'Non-Hispanic White'
         WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'Non-Hispanic Black'
         WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Other Race - Including Multi-Racial' THEN 'Other'
         ELSE NULL
       END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Education level (derived categories)
-- Map detailed education responses to primary/secondary/college/not recorded
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_education_level AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
         WHEN f."education_level_adults_20" IN (
              'Less Than 9th Grade',
              'Less than 9th grade'
            ) THEN 'primary school'
         WHEN f."education_level_adults_20" IN (
              '9-11th Grade (Includes 12th grade with no diploma)',
              '9-11th grade (Includes 12th grade with no diploma)',
              'High School Grad/GED or Equivalent',
              'High school graduate/GED or equivalent'
            ) THEN 'secondary school'
         WHEN f."education_level_adults_20" IN (
              'Some College or AA degree',
              'Some college or AA degree',
              'College Graduate or above',
              'College graduate or above'
            ) THEN 'college or above'
         ELSE 'not recorded'
       END AS "education_level"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5 Poverty income ratio (PIR) - raw values
-- Extract raw PIR values for cohort participants
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_poverty_income_ratio_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5b Poverty income ratio (PIR) quartile cutoffs among non-missing values
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_poverty_income_ratio_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty") AS q3
FROM temp_poverty_income_ratio_raw
WHERE "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" IS NOT NULL;

-- 4.5c Poverty income ratio (PIR) categorized into quartiles plus missing category
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_poverty_income_ratio_pir AS
SELECT
  "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" IS NULL THEN 'Q_unknown (for missing values)'
    WHEN "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_poverty_income_ratio_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1'
    WHEN "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_poverty_income_ratio_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2'
    WHEN "ratio_of_family_income_to_poverty" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_poverty_income_ratio_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3'
    ELSE 'Q4'
  END AS "poverty_income_ratio_pir"
FROM temp_poverty_income_ratio_raw;

-- 4.6 UACR-SACR ratio - raw continuous value
-- Compute UACR-SACR ratio = UACR (mg/g) / (serum albumin (g/dL) / serum creatinine (mg/dL))
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       (f."albumin_creatinine_ratio_mg_g" / (f."albumin_g_dl" / f."creatinine_mg_dl")) AS "uacr_sacr_ratio_value"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6b UACR-SACR ratio quartile cutoffs
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uacr_sacr_ratio_value") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uacr_sacr_ratio_value") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uacr_sacr_ratio_value") AS q3
FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_raw;

-- 4.6c UACR-SACR ratio categorized into quartiles
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_sacr_ratio AS
SELECT
  "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "uacr_sacr_ratio_value" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25'
    WHEN "uacr_sacr_ratio_value" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25 and <=50'
    WHEN "uacr_sacr_ratio_value" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50 and <=75'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75'
  END AS "uacr_sacr_ratio"
FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_raw;

-- 4.7 Diabetic retinopathy presence (outcome)
-- Map retinopathy status to binary outcome: 1 = present, 0 = absent
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetic_retinopathy_presence AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       CASE
         WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'Yes' THEN 1
         WHEN f."diabetes_affected_eyes_had_retinopathy" = 'No' THEN 0
         ELSE NULL
       END AS "diabetic_retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table Assembly ==========

-- Assemble final analysis table with all covariates, predictor, and outcome
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  a."age_in_years_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  e."education_level",
  p."poverty_income_ratio_pir",
  u."uacr_sacr_ratio",
  d."diabetic_retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_in_years_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_education_level e ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = e."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_poverty_income_ratio_pir p ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = p."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_uacr_sacr_ratio u ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = u."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_diabetic_retinopathy_presence d ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = d."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========

SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_in_years_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."education_level",
    ft."poverty_income_ratio_pir",
    ft."uacr_sacr_ratio",
    ft."diabetic_retinopathy_presence"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

R:
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("diabetic_retinopathy_presence")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["diabetic_retinopathy_presence"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_
    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))
    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L
    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))
    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }
    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)
    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))
    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }
    df[[outcome_var]] <- y
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
            
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    model <- svyglm(formula,design = survey_design, family = quasibinomial()) 
            
    
    result_table <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
            select(term, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)
